prompt: Create an executive editorial hero image for 'How Executives Turn Ambiguity into Capability'. Show ambiguous signals and incomplete fragments being organized into clear decision paths, ownership, feedback loops, and a reusable operating capability. Use sophisticated abstract systems imagery, layered information becoming structured, and no heroic individual portraiture.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply ambiguity is always beneficial.
Do not claim quantified executive-performance outcomes.
Do not present one method as universally sufficient.
